title: Em Dash Parse Failures in PowerShell 5.1
description: Unicode em dash U+2014 inside double-quoted strings causes parse errors in PowerShell 5.1 but not 7. Must use ASCII dashes in double-quoted strings. Previously found in 26 files. Regression guard: run PS 5.1 parse check after every code generation pass.
notes: Regression detection: grep for \u2014 in .ps1/.psm1 double-quoted strings. Discovered Session 2. Must validate after every edit pass.
resolution: VERIFIED - 0 em dashes in active files
